name: [GenAI][Order Support Assistant] Agent loop / fan-out threshold breach
message: Repeated agent replanning/loop events exceeding threshold — treat as both a reliability and cost-risk event (runaway agent pattern). @pagerduty-genai-oncall
source_addendum_ref: AI Observability - Datadog Implementation Addendum, §8 — 'Hard stop after defined step count, repeated tool sequence or fan-out threshold'
